caveats: coarse signal: 10 tasks — each task is ~10.0pp; do not over-read small gaps
first-attempt pass rate is the SC-5b number; eventual-minus-first is the edit-to-fix (G10) leverage signal
rates depend on the primer (generator configuration) and the model/seed — record them with the verdict
assessment.decision: deferred to the maintainer (VR-5) — this is descriptive analysis of the measured rates, NOT the KC-2 verdict
